content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the new `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs` (additive test fixture builder) and related `MockBrAdapter`/`MockBvAdapter` dispatch plumbing in `src/test_support/br.rs` and `src/test_support/bv.rs`. Cross-checked arg formatting against `BrCommand`/`BrMutationAdapter` (`create_bead` → `create --title=... --type=... --priority=... --labels=... --description=...`, `close_bead` → `close <id> --reason=...`, `add_dependency` default-blocks → `dep add <from> <to>`, `sync_flush` → `sync --flush-only`) and confirmed the fixture's parsers match each format. Verified `next_ready_issue` correctly iterates open non-Epic issues with closed Blocks deps, dependency ordering in serialized bead rows matches the smoke test's positional assertions, and `validate_fixture_working_dir` correctly scopes adapter calls to the fixture's temp dir. The smoke test covers all acceptance criteria: milestone exists in Ready state, `plan.md`/`plan.json` persisted, `.beads/issues.jsonl` has the expected 6 rows (3 epics + 3 tasks, matching the 3-bead bundle plus root/workstream epics), and mock adapters return responses consistent with graph mutations (create/close/dep add propagate to the JSONL and `br list` output). The smoke test completes in 0.01s (well under the 1s AC), all 1066 lib tests pass, and `cargo build --tests` succeeds. All 24 `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` errors are pre-existing on master (confirmed by running clippy on both branches) — not introduced by this work. No correctness bugs, safety problems, or significant maintainability risks found. Minor observations (inconsistent `MockBvState` vs `MockBrState` `Debug` impls, hard-coded 2-workstream assumption with `unreachable!()` in `scenario_bead_graph_issues`, and `parse_create_issue_spec` reassigns `labels` to empty `Vec` each iteration) are cosmetic/style-only and explicitly out of review scope.

## Amendments

None.
